from django.db import models
from rest_framework import serializers

class Product(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=255)
    description = models.TextField()
    price = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2)
    sku = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    warehouse_location = models.TextField()
    supplier_notes = models.TextField()
    internal_cost = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

class ProductSummarySerializer(serializers.ModelSerializer):
    class Meta:
        model = Product
        fields = ["id", "name", "price"]

def list_products(request):
    products = Product.objects.only("id", "name", "price")
    serializer = ProductSummarySerializer(products, many=True)
    return serializer.data
